title: Decorative-Desing Functions And Blocks: Furniture Mod
description: Decorative-Desing Functions And Blocks: Furniture Mod adds decorative blocks, new plants and mobs.
body:
DDFAB: Furniture Mod is an add-on for the Decorative-Design Functions And Blocks mod, adds decorative blocks, new crops and mobs.

**The main features of the mod on version 1.1.0 1.21.1 of Neoforge:**
- New types of cake with new ingredients
- New cocoa-like crop  -  banana
- New type of berries - blueberries
- Redstone mechanisms
- New type of nether wart
- New armor trim smithing template
- ! New piston type -  netherite !
- Netherite repeater that can be placed in water and lava
- Benches of all types of wood
- A new type of seaweed
- New wolf variant - sheepdog (plains)
